externalRuleNames: Disallow for-of Loops
Disallow for-of Loops
rules.rationale: This overlaps with a style preference from another ecosystem and is not appropriate as a repo-wide policy here.

externalRuleNames: Disallow ES2015 Modules
Disallow Missing React When Using JSX

rules.rationale: These are obsolete for a modern TypeScript + React + ESM codebase.

externalRuleNames: Detect Missing Template String Indicator in JavaScript
Disallow Arrow Function Expressions

Disallow Default Parameters
Disallow Destructuring

Disallow Logical Assignment Operators

externalRuleNames: Avoid Using JSON.stringify for Object Keys

externalRuleNames: Disallow process.exit() usage

Covered heuristically by the .fooSync() no-restricted-syntax selector instead of eslint-plugin-n's dedicated no-sync rule.
Enforced with a top-level AwaitExpression selector instead of a dedicated rule id.
